blended.narrative: Ski Granby Ranch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 24".
